description_long: This is a heavily armored, futuristic combat tactical vehicle with a low, wide profile and dual large-caliber cannons mounted on a central rotating turret. The vehicle features thick, angular armor plating covering the entire body, with reinforced sections around the turret and front hull. Its propulsion system consists of robust, continuous tank treads designed for traversing rough urban terrain, with visible suspension components and armored side skirts. The turret is equipped with advanced optics and sensor arrays, including a prominent periscope and antenna, suggesting sophisticated targeting and communication capabilities. The vehicle is painted in a dark green, matte finish with subtle weathering and dirt accumulation, and displays a red insignia on both sides of the turret and the front hull. The overall design emphasizes durability, firepower, and urban combat readiness.
description: A heavily armored, dual-cannon combat vehicle with tank treads, advanced sensors, and a matte green finish featuring red insignia.
description_view_0: Front view showing dual cannons, thick frontal armor, and a red insignia on the lower hull.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the tank treads, side armor skirts, and red insignia on the turret.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the turret, exhausts, and the full width of the armored hull.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible treads, side armor, and another red insignia on the turret.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two large-caliber cannon mounts on the central turret, both forward-facing; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; reinforced turret and front hull; sloped and modular panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green matte paint with weathering and dirt; no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: Red insignia on both sides of the turret and the front hull; no numbers or additional symbols visible.
